docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEATTY, ECKHART AS TO DEFENDANT SINGER, ANNE AS AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA ANNSWERS;DBA ANNE SIGNER MARKETING DEVELOPMENT CONSULTING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
